## Epic

Quality and Delivery

## Description

- Build dedicated audit trail view for account-level events
- Show event type, actor, timestamp, and metadata summary
- Add export option (CSV) for user records
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Table on desktop, stacked cards on mobile
  - Metadata columns truncate with tooltip expansion
  - Export action visible and keyboard accessible

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Audit trail data loads correctly
- [ ] Filtering/sorting works
- [ ] CSV export works and format is documented
- [ ] PR includes screenshots (table/cards/filter/export)

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `compliance`, `priority-medium`
